description: ## Component: hx-textarea (UPGRADE) **Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries** Upgrade existing scaffold to production-grade multi-line text field with auto-resize, character count, and Drupal Form API integration. ### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component) Properties control validation/behavior. Slots allow editorial control over labels and help text. See `apps/docs/src/content/docs/drupal-integration/twig/slots.md` hybrid form pattern. ### API Design **Properties:** - `name`, `value`, `placeholder`, `required`, `disabled`, `readonly` - `rows`: number (initial visible rows) - `maxlength`: number (with character count display) - `minlength`: number - `resize`: none | vertical | horizontal | auto (auto = auto-resize to content) - `label`, `error`, `help-text`: string alternatives to slots - `hx-size`: sm | md | lg **Slots:** - Default slot: Label text - `help`: Help text below textarea - `error`: Error message **CSS Parts:** `textarea`, `label`, `help-text`, `error-message`, `character-count` **Events:** `hx-input`, `hx-change` (composed: true) ### Drupal Integration ```twig Pre-existing Conditions List any chronic conditions, allergies, or ongoing treatments. ``` ### ElementInternals: Full form participation (setFormValue, setValidity) ### Healthcare Use Cases - Clinical notes, medical history, pre-existing conditions - Prescription instructions, care plan notes ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Auto-resize mode grows with content 2. Character count displays when maxlength set 3. ElementInternals form participation 4. All events fire with composed: true for Drupal AJAX 5. Label/help/error layout matches hx-text-input 6. WCAG 2.1 AA compliant
title: T1-06: hx-textarea — Multi-Line Text Field
